title: Settlebrook
description: AI-powered legal content platform monetized via Google AdSense. Built on Next.js App Router with programmatic SEO architecture and hybrid ad strategy.
challenge: Build a scalable content platform that generates legal educational content at scale while maintaining quality and monetising effectively through AdSense.
solution: Programmatic SEO architecture with hybrid ad strategy combining display and native placements, built on Next.js App Router with sub-second page loads and 90+ Lighthouse scores.
result: Sub-second legal content platform with 90+ Lighthouse scores

title: One With Prana
description: Comprehensive SEO overhaul for a regression therapy practice. Fixed technical issues, restructured content, and built local visibility from the ground up.
challenge: A wellness practice with zero online visibility — no local pack presence, broken schema, thin content, and no structured local SEO foundation.
solution: Complete SEO rebuild: pillar-cluster content architecture, proper LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup, Google Business Profile optimisation, and a local citation cleanup.
result: Complete SEO foundation with pillar-cluster architecture

title: KeepHashing
description: Technical SEO audit and cleanup for a UAE-based ASIC mining hardware supplier. Fixed critical 404s, redirect chains, and built a scalable backlink strategy.
challenge: ASIC mining supplier facing crippling technical debt: 30+ critical 404s, broken pagination, redirect chains, zero structured data, and no content pipeline.
solution: Systematic technical SEO cleanup — fixed all 404s and redirect chains, implemented canonicalisation, added LocalBusiness schema, and built a content calendar for crypto mining education.
result: Clean technical foundation with no crawl errors

title: Dexign House
description: On-page SEO overhaul and content strategy for a Lahore-based architecture and interior design studio. Fixed headings, meta tags, and built a content-first growth pipeline.
challenge: Architecture firm with no on-page SEO foundation — missing meta descriptions, poorly structured headings, thin project pages, and zero content strategy.
solution: Complete on-page optimisation: keyword-mapped meta tags, proper H1-H6 hierarchy, enriched project pages with before/after galleries, and a weekly content calendar.
result: Clean on-page SEO with keyword-optimised headings

title: Dr. Bec
description: Full-stack automation and web system for a healthcare professional. Built on GoHighLevel with automated patient workflows, intake forms, and follow-up sequences.
challenge: Healthcare practice running on manual processes — paper intake forms, manual appointment reminders, no automated follow-up or patient communication pipeline.
solution: GoHighLevel-powered automation system with custom intake forms, SMS/email appointment reminders, automated follow-up sequences, and a patient portal website.

title: CitrusHouse
description: Modern e-commerce platform built with Next.js and precision SEO. Designed for speed, conversions, and organic growth from day one.
challenge: Launch a new e-commerce brand that needs to compete with established players from day one with no existing domain authority.
solution: Next.js e-commerce platform with server-side rendering, programmatic SEO architecture, structured data for all products, and conversion-optimised UX.
